pageContext.name: Creature Feature
pageContext.description: You are an agent in the golden age of monster movies! The actors you represent specialize in particular monstrous roles and you must compete to get them the best ones possible. Tactics and poker-style bluffing will take you far – learn when to stand firm and go to a showdown or back down and accept a lesser role in a short feature. Is it better to employ your big stars now or hold them back to compete for more lucrative films? With a little luck skill and chutzpah, you may be cackling evilly over your victory in Creature Feature!
